title: aristotelia peduncularis
intro: Aristotelia peduncularis, also known as the New Zealand tea tree, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand and parts of Australia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Aristotelia peduncularis include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Aristotelia peduncularis can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and it is also used in skincare products to soothe and calm the skin.
